summary: Iteration 12 testing completed successfully. Verified new Portfolio Analytics dashboard with sector allocation pie chart, risk metrics table, performance comparison bar chart, and v2 pipeline badges. All 6 portfolios rebuilt with hardened_v2 pipeline. 11/11 backend tests passed. Frontend Analytics and Portfolio pages fully functional.

issues: Risk Radar chart not visible because all portfolios have avg_beta=None (data not available from yfinance). Component correctly handles this by not rendering - not a bug, just data availability.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/overview returns 6 active portfolios
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/analytics returns global_sector_allocation array (10 sectors)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/analytics returns portfolios array with avg_beta, volatility, win_rate, top3_concentration
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/analytics returns top_performer and worst_performer per portfolio
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/analytics returns aggregate metrics (total_invested, total_value, total_pnl, active_count)
Backend: All 6 portfolios use hardened_v2 pipeline (construction_log.pipeline)
Backend: Each portfolio has 9-10 stocks with enriched data (technical_signal, fundamental_grade, filing_insight)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log-all/recent returns logs array (0 entries - no rebalancing yet)
Backend: GET /api/bse/gainers returns BSE gainers (20 stocks with scripname, change_percent)
Backend: Analytics data structure matches frontend expectations
Frontend: Analytics page loads with 'Portfolio Analytics' title
Frontend: Sector pie chart visible with Global Sector Allocation (Financial Services 35.8%, Industrials 18.8%, etc.)
Frontend: P&L by Strategy bar chart visible
Frontend: Risk Metrics table visible with all 6 strategies
Frontend: v2 pipeline badges visible for all 6 portfolios in Risk Metrics table
Frontend: Aggregate metrics section visible (Total Invested 299L, Current Value 299.2L, Active 6/6)
Frontend: Per-portfolio sector breakdowns visible
Frontend: Refresh button functional
Frontend: Portfolio page loads with all 6 portfolio cards
Frontend: Portfolio cards expand to show Holdings tab with 10 stocks
Frontend: Holdings show technical signal badges (BULLISH/NEUTRAL), fundamental grades (A/B), AI Intelligence rationales, risk flags
Frontend: Navigation between Analytics and Portfolio pages works correctly
test_credentials: No auth required. LLM key configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: All 6 portfolios rebuilt with hardened_v2 pipeline. Each has 9-10 stocks with enriched data. Total capital 300L, current value 299.2L.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified the new Portfolio Analytics dashboard at /analytics route. Key features: (1) Global sector allocation pie chart showing Financial Services 35.8%, Industrials 18.8%, Technology 12.1%, etc. (2) P&L by Strategy bar chart (currently all 0% as portfolios just rebuilt). (3) Risk Metrics table with columns: Strategy, Invested, Value, Return, Beta, Vol, Win%, Top3 Conc, Best, Worst, Pipeline. (4) All 6 portfolios show 'v2' pipeline badge. (5) Per-portfolio sector breakdowns at bottom. Risk Radar chart not visible because avg_beta is None for all portfolios (yfinance data limitation). BSE gainers endpoint returns raw BSE API data with fields scripname, change_percent (not symbol, change_pct). No rebalancing has occurred yet.

components_working: Risk Metrics table with v2 badges
components_not_visible: Risk Radar (expected - no beta data available)

iteration_12_assessment.bse_gainers_note: BSE API returns raw data with fields: scripname, LONG_NAME, change_percent, ltradert, etc. The 'fixed from group to name parameter' mentioned in request refers to BSE API call parameter fix.
